docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED AUG-22-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HODGES, WALLACE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DECKER, CURTIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HODGES, WALLACE $2,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,690.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF CURTIS DECKER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WALLACE HODGES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,600.00 FILED BY DECKER, CURTIS AS TO DEFENDANT HODGES, WALLACE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
